Home / Services / Turf Replacement

Turf Replacement

Heat-tolerant grass installations for Raleigh's challenging microclimates

Replacing failed lawns requires more than just laying sod in our region. We analyze sun exposure (crucial for shaded Duke Forest-area yards versus sunbaked RTP office parks), foot traffic patterns, and soil pH before recommending turf types.

For most Raleigh properties, we use Zenith zoysia – a variety proven at NC State to withstand summer humidity while surviving occasional ice storms. In heavily shaded areas near UNC Chapel Hill, we install fine fescue blends that outperform standard tall fescue.

Every installation includes our 90-day establishment guarantee, with follow-up visits to adjust irrigation in clay soils that dry unevenly. We source sod from Piedmont growers to ensure compatibility with local conditions.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site analysis measuring sun exposure, drainage, and usage
  2. 02 Step 2: Soil amendment based on test results
  3. 03 Step 3: Precision grading to prevent pooling
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation with staggered seams for natural look

Benefits

  • Grass varieties selected for Triangle weather extremes
  • Proper grading prevents washouts on sloped lots
  • Includes free adjustment visits during critical first months
  • No surprise fees for soil prep – quoted upfront

Frequently Asked Questions

How long until we can use the lawn after replacement?

Most lawns are walkable in 2 weeks, but we provide detailed timelines based on grass type – quicker recovery for Bermuda in sunny Cary yards, longer for shade-tolerant blends in Chapel Hill.

Do you repair irrigation systems during replacement?

Yes, we flag damaged lines common in older Raleigh neighborhoods and can coordinate with licensed irrigators for major repairs before installation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with turf replacement? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-law-r93
